konenMCBB 0.2.0

Package index

Bart Torvik — Team Ratings

T-Rank power ratings, four factors, shooting splits, conference aggregates, and historical snapshots. Start here for team quality analysis.

torvik_team_ratings()
Get Bart Torvik team ratings (T-Rank)
torvik_four_factors()
Get Bart Torvik team four factors
torvik_shooting()
Get Bart Torvik team shooting splits
torvik_conf_stats()
Get conference-level aggregate stats (Bart Torvik)
timeMachine_ratings()
Get historical Torvik Time Machine ratings
super_sked_with_timemachine()
Super schedule joined with Time Machine ratings

Bart Torvik — Schedules & Game Stats

Game-by-game efficiency, super schedule, and season results.

get_super_sked()
Get Bart Torvik super schedule
get_games()
Get Bart Torvik game-level efficiency stats
teamBoxScore()
Get team box score game log (Bart Torvik)
dayCast()
Display today's Torvik game slate
current_resume()
Get current Torvik team resume table
historic_team_results()
Get historical Torvik team results

Bart Torvik — Player Stats

Advanced player efficiency, BPM, and shot location data.

player_stats()
Get Bart Torvik advanced player stats

ESPN — Game Data Pipeline

Fetch, parse, and store ESPN game data (box scores, play-by-play, win probability, betting lines, on/off rotations) in a local database.

espn_set_db_path()
Set the ESPN local database path
espn_teams()
Get ESPN men's college basketball team directory
espn_scoreboard()
Get ESPN daily college basketball scoreboard
espn_game()
Fetch and parse a single ESPN game
espn_process_day()
Fetch and save all ESPN games for a given date
espn_load_game()
Load a parsed ESPN game from the local database
espn_rankings_summary()
Build Incremental ESPN Season Rankings Summary

ESPN — Season Aggregation

Read and combine a full season of saved ESPN data from the local database into flat tibbles for offline analysis. No network required.

espn_season_box()
Load all team box scores for a season from the local ESPN database
espn_season_players()
Load all player box scores for a season from the local ESPN database
espn_team_season_summary()
Summarise team season stats from the local ESPN database

Sports Reference

Player game logs, team rosters, and historical team directory.

PlayerBoxScore()
Get player box score game log
teamRoster()
Get team roster from Sports Reference
teamList()
Get NCAA team list from Sports Reference

NCAA.com

Play-by-play and box scores direct from NCAA.com game data API.

ncaa_pbp()
Get NCAA play-by-play data
ncaa_player_box()
Get NCAA player box score

Injury Data

Current injury report from Covers.com.

injuryList()
Get current NCAAB injury report

Package

konenMCBB konenMCBB-package
konenMCBB: College Basketball Data Digestion for R

On this page

Developed by Charlie Konen.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
